languages.text: Whenever Servo Skull redirects an Overseer ability, it gains stacking up to 3 times +5 Intelligence and +5 Fellowship until the end of Overseer's next turn

traits.locale_text: Whenever Servo Skull redirects an Overseer ability, it gains stacking up to 3 times +5 Intelligence and +5 Fellowship until the end of Overseer's next turn

languages.text: Whenever an {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolated{/g} through the servo-skull swarm affects other creatures, the servo-skull swarm gains a stacking +5 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Whenever an ability {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}expanded{/g} through the servo-skull swarm affects other creatures, the servo-skull swarm gains a stacking +5 bonus to Intelligence and Fellowship until the end of the Overseer's next turn.

Whenever an {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolated{/g} through the servo-skull swarm affects other creatures, the servo-skull swarm gains a stacking +5 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

Whenever an {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolated{/g} through the servo-skull swarm affects other creatures, the servo-skull swarm gains a stacking +5 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

Whenever an {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolated{/g} through the servo-skull swarm affects other creatures, the servo-skull swarm gains a stacking +5 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

languages.text: Hizmelet sürüsü tarafından {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}dışdeğerlenen{/g} bir {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}kabiliyet{/g} diğer yaratıkları etkilediğinde hizmelet sürüsü, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Sosyallik{/g} niteliklerine +5 bonus (üst üste birikebilen) kazanır. Bu etki, {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen{/g}'in bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonuna dek sürer.
languages.original_text: Whenever an {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolated{/g} through the servo-skull swarm affects other creatures, the servo-skull swarm gains a stacking +5 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Hizmelet sürüsü tarafından {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}dışdeğerlenen{/g} bir kabiliyet diğer yaratıkları etkilediğinde hizmelet sürüsü, Zekâ ve Sosyallik niteliklerine +5 bonus (üst üste birikebilen) kazanır. Bu etki, Gözetmen'in bir sonraki turunun sonuna dek sürer.

Hizmelet sürüsü tarafından {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}dışdeğerlenen{/g} bir kabiliyet diğer yaratıkları etkilediğinde hizmelet sürüsü, Zekâ ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Sosyallik{/g} niteliklerine +5 bonus (üst üste birikebilen) kazanır. Bu etki, {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Gözetmen{/g}'in bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonuna dek sürer.

languages.text: Cada vez que una {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacidad{/g} {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolada{/g} a través del enjambre de servocráneos afecta a otras criaturas, el enjambre de servocráneos gana una bonificación acumulativa de +5 a su {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Inteligencia{/g} y {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Empatía{/g} hasta el final del próximo {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} del {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}supervisor{/g}.
languages.original_text: Whenever an {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolated{/g} through the servo-skull swarm affects other creatures, the servo-skull swarm gains a stacking +5 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Cada vez que una capacidad {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolada{/g} a través del enjambre de servocráneos afecta a otras criaturas, el enjambre de servocráneos gana una bonificación acumulativa de +5 a su Inteligencia y Empatía hasta el final del próximo turno del supervisor.

languages.text: 每当伺服头骨集群{g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}传播{/g}的{g|Encyclopedia:Ability}能力{/g}影响到其他生物时，伺服头骨集群的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}与{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}社交{/g}都会提高5点，此效果可叠加，持续至{g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}监察官{/g}的下个{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束。
languages.original_text: Whenever an {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolated{/g} through the servo-skull swarm affects other creatures, the servo-skull swarm gains a stacking +5 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 每当伺服头骨集群{g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}传播{/g}的能力影响到其他生物时，伺服头骨集群的智力与社交都会提高5点，此效果可叠加，持续至监察官的下个回合结束。

languages.text: Wenn eine durch den Servoschädel-Schwarm {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolierte{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}Fähigkeit{/g} andere Kreaturen beeinflusst, erhält der Servoschädel-Schwarm bis zum Ende des nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} des {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Aufsehers{/g} einen stapelbaren Bonus von +5 auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligenz{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Gefolgschaft{/g}.
languages.original_text: Whenever an {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolated{/g} through the servo-skull swarm affects other creatures, the servo-skull swarm gains a stacking +5 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Wenn eine durch den Servoschädel-Schwarm {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolierte{/g} Fähigkeit andere Kreaturen beeinflusst, erhält der Servoschädel-Schwarm bis zum Ende des nächsten Zuges des Aufsehers einen stapelbaren Bonus von +5 auf Intelligenz und Gefolgschaft.

languages.text: Chaque fois qu'une {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}capacité{/g} {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolée{/g} par l'essaim de servocrânes affecte d'autres créatures, l'essaim gagne un bonus cumulable de +5 bonus à l'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} et à la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Sociabilité{/g} jusqu'à la fin du prochain {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} du {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}surveillant{/g}.
languages.original_text: Whenever an {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolated{/g} through the servo-skull swarm affects other creatures, the servo-skull swarm gains a stacking +5 bonus to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} until the end of the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerOverseerGlossary}Overseer{/g}'s next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Chaque fois qu'une capacité {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolée{/g} par l'essaim de servocrânes affecte d'autres créatures, l'essaim gagne un bonus cumulable de +5 bonus à l'Intelligence et à la Sociabilité jusqu'à la fin du prochain tour du surveillant.

languages.text: サーヴォスカルスウォームによって{g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}外挿{/g}されたアビリティが他の生物に影響を与える間、監督者の次のターンの終了までサーヴォスカルスウォームの知性と連帯に+5のボーナスがスタックされる。
languages.original_text: Whenever an ability {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolated{/g} through the servo-skull swarm affects other creatures, the servo-skull swarm gains a stacking +5 bonus to Intelligence and Fellowship until the end of the Overseer's next turn.

traits.locale_text: サーヴォスカルスウォームによって{g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}外挿{/g}されたアビリティが他の生物に影響を与える間、監督者の次のターンの終了までサーヴォスカルスウォームの知性と連帯に+5のボーナスがスタックされる。
サーヴォスカルスウォームによって{g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}外挿{/g}されたアビリティが他の生物に影響を与える間、監督者の次のターンの終了までサーヴォスカルスウォームの知性と連帯に+5のボーナスがスタックされる。

languages.text: Когда {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}способность{/g}, {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}экстраполируемая{/g} через рой сервочерепов, действует на других существ, рой получает суммирующийся бонус +5 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллекту{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Общительности{/g} до конца следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} надзирателя.
languages.original_text: Whenever an ability {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}extrapolated{/g} through the servo-skull swarm affects other creatures, the servo-skull swarm gains a stacking +5 bonus to Intelligence and Fellowship until the end of the Overseer's next turn.

traits.locale_text: Когда способность, {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}экстраполируемая{/g} через рой сервочерепов, действует на других существ, рой получает суммирующийся бонус +5 к Интеллекту и Общительности до конца следующего хода надзирателя.

Когда способность, {g|f:215d9f42b7e6435e9ed77337156e0fc3}экстраполируемая{/g} через рой сервочерепов, действует на других существ, рой получает суммирующийся бонус +5 к Интеллекту и Общительности до конца следующего хода надзирателя.
